perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco warehouse where a woman in a black-and-white patterned bucket hat and a white lace top is excitedly showing a box of pork floss egg rolls. She gestures toward stacks of the product in the background. (2) The scene cuts to a home environment where the woman is joined by another woman wearing a black beret. They are sitting at a table with the product. (3) The women unbox the egg rolls, showing the individual packaging and then a close-up of the egg roll broken in half to reveal the dense pork floss filling. (4) They are seen eating the snack with exaggeratedly joyful expressions, nodding and gesturing to emphasize the quality.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic and upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited male voice provides a continuous voice-over narration throughout the video. (2) Occasional interjections from a female voice are heard, saying phrases like 'let's try it' in an enthusiastic tone. (3) Sound effects including a 'crunching' sound are audible when the egg roll is shown being broken and eaten. (4) The audio remains consistent in its high energy, with the music and voice-over maintaining a fast pace until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top center. (2) '肉鬆蛋捲' (Pork Floss Egg Roll) appears as a large decorative title in the middle. (3) '童話故事書' (Fairytale storybook) is used as descriptive text for the packaging. (4) '好市多 9月超級黑馬' (Costco September's super dark horse) appears as a hook to grab attention. (5) '超級好吃' (Super delicious) flashes on screen during the tasting phase. (6) Functional subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the spoken narration throughout the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Shopping at Costco) -> Transition (Unboxing at home) -> Demonstration (Tasting/Review)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 2 blurry passers-by in the warehouse background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white lace sleeveless top. The second woman wears a black beret and a dark top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first scene is a brightly lit Costco warehouse with metal shelving and pallets of food products. The second scene is a cozy indoor space with shelves holding plush toys and household items.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut with continuous background music

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy product recommendation intended to persuade viewers to purchase Ximai Pork Floss Egg Rolls from Costco. It uses a 'treasure hunt' hook in the warehouse and follows up with a sensory evaluation (visual and sound of crunching) to validate the product's quality and value (highlighting the price per unit).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed pricing breakdown, close-up of brand packaging, and highly positive review sentiments.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style captions and hyper-enthusiastic narration common in Taiwanese social media marketing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video's pacing and text density are optimized for short-form video platforms like TikTok or Reels, focusing on a 'Costco Black Horse' (undiscovered gem) narrative.
